recentReports.title: 10 Products Found
recentReports.summary: Top find is the Smart Posture Corrector - solves a universal desk-worker problem with 70%+ margins, instant user feedback, and massive evergreen demand from remote work trends.

products.name: Smart Posture Corrector with Intelligent Sensor
products.problem: Back pain, neck strain, poor posture from prolonged sitting. Instant vibration feedback when slouching.

products.name: 3-in-1 Foldable Wireless Charging Station
products.problem: Cable clutter for Apple ecosystem users. Charges iPhone, Watch, and AirPods simultaneously.

products.name: Blue Light Blocking Glasses
products.problem: Digital eye strain, headaches, sleep disruption from prolonged screen exposure.

products.name: Mini Portable Massage Gun
products.problem: Muscle tension, soreness, and pain relief. Instant deep tissue massage at home.

products.name: Pet Nail Grinder with LED Light
products.problem: Painful pet nail clipping accidents. Safe, painless nail grooming at home.

topProduct.name: Smart Posture Corrector with Intelligent Sensor
topProduct.why: Perfect problem-solution fit for desk workers. Addresses #1 complaint - back pain. 70-80% profit margins. Massive market with 50%+ US workers desk-based. Instant user feedback creates satisfaction. Evergreen demand from remote work trends.

recentReports.title: Ad Intelligence Report
recentReports.summary: Found 10 winning ad patterns, 5 trending products, and 3 contrarian angles. Top hook: 'Stop waking up like your house is on fire' for alarm clock products.
hooks: The real reason you can't [achieve goal]
Why your [common solution] is actually making it worse
The [adjective] [product] that [target audience] are obsessed with
recentReports.details:
Market Analysis:

Top Trending Products:
1. Sunrise alarm clocks - 340% search increase
2. Under desk treadmills - work-from-home fitness
3. Cold plunge tubs - recovery trend
4. Mushroom coffee - focus/productivity
5. Smart water bottles - hydration tracking

Winning Creative Angles:
- Problem-solution demo (first 3 seconds critical)
- Before/after with timestamps
- UGC testimonial with specific results
- 'Day in the life' format
- Expert authority positioning

CTA Patterns:
- 'Link in bio to claim yours'
- 'Limited spots this week'
- 'Tag someone who needs this'

recentReports.title: 5 Niche Products
recentReports.summary: Mushroom Foraging Kit, Keyboard Lube Station, Bookbinding Kit, Leather Edge Beveler, Aquascaping Tools. All 6/10 saturation or lower. High margins (55-70%).

recentReports.title: 5 Winning Products
recentReports.summary: Portable Blender (9.5/10 confidence), Neck Traction Device, 3-in-1 Wireless Charger, Pet Steam Brush, LED Face Mask. All include AliExpress/Amazon/competitor links.
